creator: patrick@pine.nl
text:
# grep MAINTAINER /usr/ports/security/maia/Makefile
MAINTAINER=     ek@purplehat.org



<ek@purplehat.com>: Host or domain name not found. Name service error for
    name=purplehat.com type=MX: Host not found, try again

Fix: 

change to right address or appoint different maintainer
How-To-Repeat: send mail to ek@purplehat.com
